# Eastory SL — Sri Lanka Travel Guide
> Your guide to exploring Sri Lanka — pristine beaches, ancient temples, vibrant culture, and unforgettable adventures.

## Navigation
- Home: https://easternsrilankahub.lk/
- Destinations: https://easternsrilankahub.lk/destinations
- Discover more: https://easternsrilankahub.lk/discover-more
- Sri Lanka Pride: https://easternsrilankahub.lk/sri-lanka-pride
- Gallery: https://easternsrilankahub.lk/gallery
- Map: https://easternsrilankahub.lk/map
- Advertise: https://easternsrilankahub.lk/advertise

## About
Eastory SL is a travel platform focused on Eastern Sri Lanka, featuring destinations, local businesses, cultural heritage, and travel resources. The platform helps travelers discover beaches, historical sites, wildlife, accommodations, restaurants, and adventure activities.

## Key Features
- Interactive map with layered data (destinations, businesses, cultural sites)
- Curated destination guides with photos and details
- Local business directory for hotels, restaurants, shops, and services
- Sri Lanka Pride section covering heritage, culture, festivals, and notable figures
- Photo gallery showcasing Sri Lanka's landscapes and attractions
## Sitemap
https://easternsrilankahub.lk/sitemap.xml
